result.stdout:
Usage:
  blake <command> [path] [options]

If no [path] is provided, the current working directory is used.

Commands:
  init <PATH>          Configure an existing Blazor WASM app for Blake.
                       Options:
                         --includeSampleContent, -s   Include sample page and update nav

  bake <PATH>          Generate static content for a Blake site.
                       Options:
                         --disableDefaultRenderers, -dr   Disable the built-in Bootstrap container renderers
                         --includeDrafts                  Bakes markdown files that contain 'draft: true' in the frontmatter (they are skipped by default)
                         --clean, -cl                     Deletes the .generated folder before re-generating site content
                         --continueOnError, -ce           Continues baking even if some pages fail to generate. By default, the process stops on the first error.

  new <PATH>           Generates a new Blake site
                       Options:
                         --template, -t   The name or short name of the template to create a site from (optional). Uses the default Blazor WASM template if not specified.
                         --siteName, -sn  The name of the new site (optional). Uses the directory name if not specified. If configured in the template, replaces the template name with the provided name.
                         --url, -u        The URL of the repo that hosts the template (optional). Can be used to install templates outside the public Blake registry. Uses Git, so should work with any repo you have access to.
                         --list           Lists all available templates in the public Blake registry

  serve <PATH>         Bake and run the Blazor app in development mode.
                       Options:
                         --disableDefaultRenderers, -dr   Disable the built-in Bootstrap container renderers

  --help               Show this help message.

commands.payload:
Usage:
  blake <command> [path] [options]

If no [path] is provided, the current working directory is used.

Commands:
  init <PATH>          Configure an existing Blazor WASM app for Blake.
                       Options:
                         --includeSampleContent, -s   Include sample page and update nav

  bake <PATH>          Generate static content for a Blake site.
                       Options:
                         --disableDefaultRenderers, -dr   Disable the built-in Bootstrap container renderers
                         --includeDrafts                  Bakes markdown files that contain 'draft: true' in the frontmatter (they are skipped by default)
                         --clean, -cl                     Deletes the .generated folder before re-generating site content
                         --continueOnError, -ce           Continues baking even if some pages fail to generate. By default, the process stops on the first error.

  new <PATH>           Generates a new Blake site
                       Options:
                         --template, -t   The name or short name of the template to create a site from (optional). Uses the default Blazor WASM template if not specified.
                         --siteName, -sn  The name of the new site (optional). Uses the directory name if not specified. If configured in the template, replaces the template name with the provided name.
                         --url, -u        The URL of the repo that hosts the template (optional). Can be used to install templates outside the public Blake registry. Uses Git, so should work with any repo you have access to.
                         --list           Lists all available templates in the public Blake registry

  serve <PATH>         Bake and run the Blazor app in development mode.
                       Options:
                         --disableDefaultRenderers, -dr   Disable the built-in Bootstrap container renderers

  --help               Show this help message.
